languages.text:
{n}Вы забираете меч у Яруба, передав ему вознаграждение. Лицо сержанта озаряется почти детской радостью.{/n}
"Приятно иметь дело с таким человеком, как вы, Ваше Благородие! Благодарю, значит, за помощь. У меня здесь неподалеку схрон — дождусь, пока бой закончится и ваши люди придут, чтобы на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфол{/g} мне с ними улететь. Если будет на то судьба, еще увидимся". {n}Яруб низко кланяется вам и быстро уходит по направлению к воротам.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Яруб
Выполняем Obj2_Jarub
Играем Себериан без меча

Яруб
Выполняем Obj2_Jarub
Играем Себериан без меча

languages.text:
{n}You take the sword from Jarub and hand over the payment. The sergeant's face lights up with almost childlike joy.{/n}
"It's a pleasure doing business with someone like you, my {mf|lord|lady}! Thanks for your help, then. I've got a safe spot nearby — I'll wait until the fighting's over and your people arrive to take me to Footfall. We'll see each other again, if destiny wills it." {n}Jarub offers you a low bow and hurries off toward the gates.{/n}

У меня здесь неподалеку схрон — дождусь, пока бой закончится и ваши люди придут, чтобы на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфол{/g} мне с ними улететь. We'll see each other again, if destiny wills it." {n}Jarub offers you a low bow and hurries off toward the gates.{/n}

languages.text:
{n}Jarub te entrega la espada y tú le das el pago. El rostro del sargento se ilumina con una alegría casi infantil.{/n}
«¡Un placer hacer negocios con alguien de su categoría, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Gracias por su ayuda. Tengo un lugar seguro cerca; esperaré a que termine la pelea y llegue su gente para llevarme a Paso. Volveremos a vernos, destino mediante». {n}Jarub te dedica una reverencia profunda y se aleja rápidamente hacia la puerta.{/n}
languages.original_text:
{n}You take the sword from Jarub and hand over the payment. The sergeant's face lights up with almost childlike joy.{/n}
"It's a pleasure doing business with someone like you, my {mf|lord|lady}! Thanks for your help, then. I've got a safe spot nearby — I'll wait until the fighting's over and your people arrive to take me to Footfall. We'll see each other again, if destiny wills it." {n}Jarub offers you a low bow and hurries off toward the gates.{/n}

Volveremos a vernos, destino mediante». {n}Jarub te dedica una reverencia profunda y se aleja rápidamente hacia la puerta.{/n}

languages.text:
{n}你从雅鲁布手中接过剑，付了报酬。军士脸上亮起了孩子般的喜悦。{/n}
“和您这样的人做买卖真是痛快，大人！那就多谢您帮忙了。我在附近有个安全的藏身处，我就去那儿待到战斗结束，等您的人来接我去落脚港。如果命运允许，我们还会再见的。”{n}雅鲁布向你深鞠一躬，匆匆朝大门跑去。{/n}
languages.original_text:
{n}You take the sword from Jarub and hand over the payment. The sergeant's face lights up with almost childlike joy.{/n}
"It's a pleasure doing business with someone like you, my {mf|lord|lady}! Thanks for your help, then. I've got a safe spot nearby — I'll wait until the fighting's over and your people arrive to take me to Footfall. We'll see each other again, if destiny wills it." {n}Jarub offers you a low bow and hurries off toward the gates.{/n}

{n}你从雅鲁布手中接过剑，付了报酬。军士脸上亮起了孩子般的喜悦。{/n}
“和您这样的人做买卖真是痛快，大人！那就多谢您帮忙了。我在附近有个安全的藏身处，我就去那儿待到战斗结束，等您的人来接我去落脚港。如果命运允许，我们还会再见的。”{n}雅鲁布向你深鞠一躬，匆匆朝大门跑去。{/n}

languages.text:
{n}Vous prenez l'épée des mains de Jarub et lui remettez la somme convenue. Le visage du sergent s'illumine d'une joie presque enfantine.{/n}
« C'est un plaisir de faire affaire avec quelqu'un comme vous, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame} ! Merci pour votre aide. J'ai une planque pas loin d'ici, je vais m'y réfugier en attendant la fin des combats et l'arrivée de votre escorte chargée de m'emmener à Castel. On se reverra, si le destin le veut. » {n}Jarub vous adresse une profonde révérence avant de se diriger vers la porte d'un pas vif.{/n}
languages.original_text:
{n}You take the sword from Jarub and hand over the payment. The sergeant's face lights up with almost childlike joy.{/n}
"It's a pleasure doing business with someone like you, my {mf|lord|lady}! Thanks for your help, then. I've got a safe spot nearby — I'll wait until the fighting's over and your people arrive to take me to Footfall. We'll see each other again, if destiny wills it." {n}Jarub offers you a low bow and hurries off toward the gates.{/n}

« C'est un plaisir de faire affaire avec quelqu'un comme vous, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame} ! Merci pour votre aide. J'ai une planque pas loin d'ici, je vais m'y réfugier en attendant la fin des combats et l'arrivée de votre escorte chargée de m'emmener à Castel. On se reverra, si le destin le veut. » {n}Jarub vous adresse une profonde révérence avant de se diriger vers la porte d'un pas vif.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Jarub'dan kılıcı alıp ödemeyi yapıyorsun. Çavuşun yüzü neredeyse çocuksu bir neşeyle aydınlanıyor.{/n} "Sizin gibi biriyle iş yapmak zevktir {mf|lordum|leydim}! Yardımınız için teşekkürler. Yakınlarda güvenli bir yerim var. Çatışmalar bitene ve adamlarınız beni Binliman'a götürmek üzere gelene dek bekleyeceğim. Kader uygun görürse tekrar görüşürüz." {n}Jarub, önünde saygıyla eğilip aceleyle uzaklaşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text:
{n}You take the sword from Jarub and hand over the payment. The sergeant's face lights up with almost childlike joy.{/n}
"It's a pleasure doing business with someone like you, my {mf|lord|lady}! Thanks for your help, then. I've got a safe spot nearby — I'll wait until the fighting's over and your people arrive to take me to Footfall. We'll see each other again, if destiny wills it." {n}Jarub offers you a low bow and hurries off toward the gates.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub'dan kılıcı alıp ödemeyi yapıyorsun. Çavuşun yüzü neredeyse çocuksu bir neşeyle aydınlanıyor.{/n} "Sizin gibi biriyle iş yapmak zevktir {mf|lordum|leydim}! Yardımınız için teşekkürler. Yakınlarda güvenli bir yerim var. Çatışmalar bitene ve adamlarınız beni Binliman'a götürmek üzere gelene dek bekleyeceğim. Kader uygun görürse tekrar görüşürüz." {n}Jarub, önünde saygıyla eğilip aceleyle uzaklaşıyor.{/n}

languages.text:
{n}Du nimmst das Schwert von Jarub entgegen und bezahlst ihn. Das Gesicht des Sergeants hellt sich in beinahe kindlicher Freude auf.{/n}
"Es ist ein Vergnügen, mit jemandem wie Euch Geschäfte zu machen, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Dann danke für die Hilfe. Ich habe in der Nähe ein sicheres Versteck ... dort werde ich warten, bis die Kämpfe vorbei sind und mich Eure Leute nach Footfall bringen. Wir werden uns wiedersehen, wenn es das Schicksal will." {n}Jarub verneigt sich tief und eilt zu den Toren.{/n}
languages.original_text:
{n}You take the sword from Jarub and hand over the payment. The sergeant's face lights up with almost childlike joy.{/n}
"It's a pleasure doing business with someone like you, my {mf|lord|lady}! Thanks for your help, then. I've got a safe spot nearby — I'll wait until the fighting's over and your people arrive to take me to Footfall. We'll see each other again, if destiny wills it." {n}Jarub offers you a low bow and hurries off toward the gates.{/n}

Wir werden uns wiedersehen, wenn es das Schicksal will." {n}Jarub verneigt sich tief und eilt zu den Toren.{/n}

languages.text:
{n}ジャラブから剣を受け取り、報酬を渡す。すると、その顔はまるで子供のように喜びに満ちた表情になった。{/n}
「あなたのような方と取引できて、大変光栄です、{mf|殿|殿}！ご協力ありがとうございます。私は近所に安全な場所があるので、戦闘が終わって、あなたの人たちが到着するまで待っていようと思います。そして、フットフォールまで連れて行ってくれるでしょう。運命が許せば、またお会いしましょう。」{n}ジャラブは深く頭を下げ、急いで城門へと向かった。{/n}
languages.original_text:
{n}You take the sword from Jarub and hand over the payment. The sergeant's face lights up with almost childlike joy.{/n}
"It's a pleasure doing business with someone like you, my {mf|lord|lady}! Thanks for your help, then. I've got a safe spot nearby — I'll wait until the fighting's over and your people arrive to take me to Footfall. We'll see each other again, if destiny wills it." {n}Jarub offers you a low bow and hurries off toward the gates.{/n}
